name: Lifestyle In-Use Scene
description: Show product being used in a natural setting — hands holding, gym bag, kitchen counter, etc.
prompt_template: A person {action} with this exact {product_name}. Natural {setting}. {time_of_day} lighting. {camera_distance} shot. Authentic candid moment. Slight motion blur on hands. {dof}. Warm color grading. Lifestyle editorial photography.

placeholders.setting: modern kitchen counter with protein tubs in background
placeholders.dof: Shallow depth of field with soft bokeh

example_prompt: A person shaking a drink with this exact G FUEL shaker bottle. Natural modern kitchen counter with protein tubs in background. Morning window light. Medium close-up shot. Authentic candid moment. Slight motion blur on hands. Shallow depth of field with soft bokeh. Warm color grading. Lifestyle editorial photography.
tips: Specify 'exact product' + 'this' to anchor the input image
Motion blur on hands keeps the scene feeling natural
Warm grading feels more relatable than clinical white light
If hands look weird, add 'only one person' and 'hands visible from wrist up'
